ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the simulation was created */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., shopping mall, train station) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the environment */,
  "time_interval_start" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation interval */,
  "time_interval_end" TEXT /* End time of the simulation interval */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., population size, pedestrian profile) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pedestrian profile */,
  "population_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population (e.g., normal, uniform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES pedestrian_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the pedestrian profile (e.g., slimFastActiv, DefaultProfile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pedestrian profile */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the pedestrian */,
  "agility" TEXT /* Agility level of the pedestrian (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "behavior_pattern" TEXT /* Typical behavior pattern (e.g., direct, meandering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gates" (
  "gate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gate */,
  "gate_name" TEXT /* Name of the gate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gate */,
  "gate_type" TEXT /* Type of gate (e.g., entry, exit) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the gate */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the gate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_of_interest" (
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point of interest */,
  "poi_name" TEXT /* Name of the point of interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point of interest */,
  "poi_type" TEXT /* Type of point of interest (e.g., store, restroom) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the point of interest */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the point of interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement pattern */,
  "gate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gate */,
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the point of interest */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size of the movement pattern */,
  "time_from" TEXT /* Start time of the movement pattern */,
  "time_to" TEXT /* End time of the movement pattern */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of movement (e.g., north, south) */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Rate of pedestrian flow */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of pedestrians in the movement pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_patterns_poi_id FOREIGN KEY ("poi_id") REFERENCES points_of_interest ("poi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_patterns_gate_id FOREIGN KEY ("gate_id") REFERENCES gates ("gate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the simulation */,
  "bottlenecks" TEXT /* Identified bottlenecks in the simulation */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, graph) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Binary data of the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES simulation_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "prediction_description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
